Create FastAPI CRUD endpoints for Patient with pagination, search, and proper error handling

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.patient import Patient
from app.schemas.patient import PatientCreate, PatientUpdate, PatientResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/patients", tags=["Patients"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_patients(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all patients with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Patient)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Patient.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Patient, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=PatientResponse)
async def get_patient(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get patient by ID"""
    patient = db.query(Patient).filter(Patient.id == id).first()
    if not patient:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Patient not found")
    return patient


@router.post("/", response_model=PatientResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_patient(
    data: PatientCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new patient"""
    patient = Patient(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(patient)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(patient)
    return patient


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=PatientResponse)
async def update_patient(
    id: UUID,
    data: PatientUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update patient"""
    patient = db.query(Patient).filter(Patient.id == id).first()
    if not patient:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Patient not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(patient, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(patient)
    return patient


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_patient(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete patient"""
    patient = db.query(Patient).filter(Patient.id == id).first()
    if not patient:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Patient not found")

    db.delete(patient)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from sqlalchemy import Column, String, Integer, Float, Boolean, Text, Date, DateTime, ForeignKey
from sqlalchemy.orm import relationship
from sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql import UUID, JSONB
from datetime import datetime
import uuid

from app.core.database import Base


class Patient(Base):
    __tablename__ = "patients"

    id = Column(UUID(as_uuid=True), primary_key=True, default=uuid.uuid4)

    name = Column(String(255))
    email = Column(String(255))
    phone = Column(String(255))
    dateOfBirth = Column(Date)
    gender = Column(String(50))
    bloodGroup = Column(String(255))
    address = Column(Text)
    emergencyContact = Column(String(255))
    insuranceProvider = Column(String(255))
    insuranceNumber = Column(String(255))

    created_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow)
    updated_at = Column(DateTime, default=datetime.utcnow, onupdate=datetime.utcnow)

    def __repr__(self):
        return f"<Patient {self.id}>"
```

```python
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field, ConfigDict
from typing import Optional, List, Dict, Any

from datetime import datetime, date


class PatientBase(BaseModel):

    email: str
    phone: str
    dateOfBirth: date
    gender: str
    bloodGroup: str
    address: Optional[str] = None
    emergencyContact: str


class PatientCreate(PatientBase):
    pass


class PatientUpdate(BaseModel):
    name: Optional[str] = None
    email: Optional[str] = None
    phone: Optional[str] = None
    dateOfBirth: Optional[date] = None
    gender: Optional[str] = None
    bloodGroup: Optional[str] = None
    address: Optional[str] = None
    emergencyContact: Optional[str] = None


class PatientResponse(PatientBase):
    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)

    id: UUID
    created_at: datetime
    updated_at: datetime
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.supplier import Supplier
from app.schemas.supplier import SupplierCreate, SupplierUpdate, SupplierResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/suppliers", tags=["Suppliers"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_suppliers(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all suppliers with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Supplier)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Supplier.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Supplier, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=SupplierResponse)
async def get_supplier(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get supplier by ID"""
    supplier = db.query(Supplier).filter(Supplier.id == id).first()
    if not supplier:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Supplier not found")
    return supplier


@router.post("/", response_model=SupplierResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_supplier(
    data: SupplierCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new supplier"""
    supplier = Supplier(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(supplier)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(supplier)
    return supplier


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=SupplierResponse)
async def update_supplier(
    id: UUID,
    data: SupplierUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update supplier"""
    supplier = db.query(Supplier).filter(Supplier.id == id).first()
    if not supplier:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Supplier not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(supplier, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(supplier)
    return supplier


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_supplier(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete supplier"""
    supplier = db.query(Supplier).filter(Supplier.id == id).first()
    if not supplier:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Supplier not found")

    db.delete(supplier)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.class import Class
from app.schemas.class import ClassCreate, ClassUpdate, ClassResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/classes", tags=["Classes"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_classes(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all classes with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Class)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Class.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Class, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=ClassResponse)
async def get_class(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get class by ID"""
    class = db.query(Class).filter(Class.id == id).first()
    if not class:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Class not found")
    return class


@router.post("/", response_model=ClassResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_class(
    data: ClassCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new class"""
    class = Class(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(class)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(class)
    return class


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=ClassResponse)
async def update_class(
    id: UUID,
    data: ClassUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update class"""
    class = db.query(Class).filter(Class.id == id).first()
    if not class:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Class not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(class, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(class)
    return class


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_class(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete class"""
    class = db.query(Class).filter(Class.id == id).first()
    if not class:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Class not found")

    db.delete(class)
    db.commit()
```

```python
    return {

        "total": total,
        "page": page,

):
```

```python
    fee = db.query(Fee).filter(Fee.id == id).first()
    if not fee:

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.lesson import Lesson
from app.schemas.lesson import LessonCreate, LessonUpdate, LessonResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/lessons", tags=["Lessons"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_lessons(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all lessons with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Lesson)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Lesson.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Lesson, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=LessonResponse)
async def get_lesson(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get lesson by ID"""
    lesson = db.query(Lesson).filter(Lesson.id == id).first()
    if not lesson:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Lesson not found")
    return lesson


@router.post("/", response_model=LessonResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_lesson(
    data: LessonCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new lesson"""
    lesson = Lesson(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(lesson)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(lesson)
    return lesson


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=LessonResponse)
async def update_lesson(
    id: UUID,
    data: LessonUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update lesson"""
    lesson = db.query(Lesson).filter(Lesson.id == id).first()
    if not lesson:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Lesson not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(lesson, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(lesson)
    return lesson


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_lesson(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete lesson"""
    lesson = db.query(Lesson).filter(Lesson.id == id).first()
    if not lesson:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Lesson not found")

    db.delete(lesson)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.payout import Payout
from app.schemas.payout import PayoutCreate, PayoutUpdate, PayoutResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/payouts", tags=["Payouts"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_payouts(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all payouts with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Payout)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Payout.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Payout, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=PayoutResponse)
async def get_payout(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get payout by ID"""
    payout = db.query(Payout).filter(Payout.id == id).first()
    if not payout:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Payout not found")
    return payout


@router.post("/", response_model=PayoutResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_payout(
    data: PayoutCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new payout"""
    payout = Payout(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(payout)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(payout)
    return payout


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=PayoutResponse)
async def update_payout(
    id: UUID,
    data: PayoutUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update payout"""
    payout = db.query(Payout).filter(Payout.id == id).first()
    if not payout:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Payout not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(payout, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(payout)
    return payout


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_payout(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete payout"""
    payout = db.query(Payout).filter(Payout.id == id).first()
    if not payout:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Payout not found")

    db.delete(payout)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.reservation import Reservation
from app.schemas.reservation import ReservationCreate, ReservationUpdate, ReservationResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/reservations", tags=["Reservations"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_reservations(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all reservations with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Reservation)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Reservation.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Reservation, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=ReservationResponse)
async def get_reservation(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get reservation by ID"""
    reservation = db.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == id).first()
    if not reservation:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Reservation not found")
    return reservation


@router.post("/", response_model=ReservationResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_reservation(
    data: ReservationCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new reservation"""
    reservation = Reservation(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(reservation)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(reservation)
    return reservation


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=ReservationResponse)
async def update_reservation(
    id: UUID,
    data: ReservationUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update reservation"""
    reservation = db.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == id).first()
    if not reservation:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Reservation not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(reservation, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(reservation)
    return reservation


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_reservation(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete reservation"""
    reservation = db.query(Reservation).filter(Reservation.id == id).first()
    if not reservation:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Reservation not found")

    db.delete(reservation)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.propertyInquiry import PropertyInquiry
from app.schemas.propertyInquiry import PropertyInquiryCreate, PropertyInquiryUpdate, PropertyInquiryResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/propertyInquiries", tags=["PropertyInquiries"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_propertyInquiries(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all propertyInquiries with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(PropertyInquiry)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                PropertyInquiry.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(PropertyInquiry, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=PropertyInquiryResponse)
async def get_propertyInquiry(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get propertyInquiry by ID"""
    propertyInquiry = db.query(PropertyInquiry).filter(PropertyInquiry.id == id).first()
    if not propertyInquiry:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="PropertyInquiry not found")
    return propertyInquiry


@router.post("/", response_model=PropertyInquiryResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_propertyInquiry(
    data: PropertyInquiryCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new propertyInquiry"""
    propertyInquiry = PropertyInquiry(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(propertyInquiry)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(propertyInquiry)
    return propertyInquiry


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=PropertyInquiryResponse)
async def update_propertyInquiry(
    id: UUID,
    data: PropertyInquiryUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update propertyInquiry"""
    propertyInquiry = db.query(PropertyInquiry).filter(PropertyInquiry.id == id).first()
    if not propertyInquiry:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="PropertyInquiry not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(propertyInquiry, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(propertyInquiry)
    return propertyInquiry


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_propertyInquiry(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete propertyInquiry"""
    propertyInquiry = db.query(PropertyInquiry).filter(PropertyInquiry.id == id).first()
    if not propertyInquiry:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="PropertyInquiry not found")

    db.delete(propertyInquiry)
    db.commit()
```

```python
    units: int

    address: Optional[str] = None

class BuildingResponse(BuildingBase):

    id: UUID
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.tenant import Tenant
from app.schemas.tenant import TenantCreate, TenantUpdate, TenantResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/tenants", tags=["Tenants"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_tenants(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all tenants with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Tenant)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Tenant.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Tenant, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=TenantResponse)
async def get_tenant(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):

    tenant = db.query(Tenant).filter(Tenant.id == id).first()
    if not tenant:

    return tenant

    data: TenantCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),

):
    """Create new tenant"""
    tenant = Tenant(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(tenant)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tenant)
    return tenant


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=TenantResponse)
async def update_tenant(
    id: UUID,
    data: TenantUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update tenant"""
    tenant = db.query(Tenant).filter(Tenant.id == id).first()
    if not tenant:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Tenant not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(tenant, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(tenant)
    return tenant


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_tenant(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete tenant"""
    tenant = db.query(Tenant).filter(Tenant.id == id).first()
    if not tenant:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Tenant not found")

    db.delete(tenant)
    db.commit()
```

```python
router = APIRouter(prefix="/transactions", tags=["Transactions"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_transactions(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all transactions with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Transaction)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Transaction.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Transaction, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=TransactionResponse)
async def get_transaction(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get transaction by ID"""
    transaction = db.query(Transaction).filter(Transaction.id == id).first()
    if not transaction:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Transaction not found")
    return transaction


@router.post("/", response_model=TransactionResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_transaction(
    data: TransactionCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new transaction"""
    transaction = Transaction(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(transaction)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(transaction)
    return transaction


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=TransactionResponse)
async def update_transaction(
    id: UUID,
    data: TransactionUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update transaction"""
    transaction = db.query(Transaction).filter(Transaction.id == id).first()
    if not transaction:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Transaction not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(transaction, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(transaction)
    return transaction


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_transaction(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete transaction"""
    transaction = db.query(Transaction).filter(Transaction.id == id).first()
    if not transaction:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Transaction not found")

    db.delete(transaction)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.portfolio import Portfolio
from app.schemas.portfolio import PortfolioCreate, PortfolioUpdate, PortfolioResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/portfolios", tags=["Portfolios"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_portfolios(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all portfolios with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Portfolio)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Portfolio.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Portfolio, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=PortfolioResponse)
async def get_portfolio(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get portfolio by ID"""
    portfolio = db.query(Portfolio).filter(Portfolio.id == id).first()
    if not portfolio:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Portfolio not found")
    return portfolio


@router.post("/", response_model=PortfolioResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_portfolio(
    data: PortfolioCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new portfolio"""
    portfolio = Portfolio(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(portfolio)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(portfolio)
    return portfolio


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=PortfolioResponse)
async def update_portfolio(
    id: UUID,
    data: PortfolioUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update portfolio"""
    portfolio = db.query(Portfolio).filter(Portfolio.id == id).first()
    if not portfolio:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Portfolio not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(portfolio, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(portfolio)
    return portfolio


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_portfolio(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete portfolio"""
    portfolio = db.query(Portfolio).filter(Portfolio.id == id).first()
    if not portfolio:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Portfolio not found")

    db.delete(portfolio)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.candidate import Candidate
from app.schemas.candidate import CandidateCreate, CandidateUpdate, CandidateResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/candidates", tags=["Candidates"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_candidates(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all candidates with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Candidate)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Candidate.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Candidate, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=CandidateResponse)
async def get_candidate(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get candidate by ID"""
    candidate = db.query(Candidate).filter(Candidate.id == id).first()
    if not candidate:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Candidate not found")
    return candidate


@router.post("/", response_model=CandidateResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_candidate(
    data: CandidateCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new candidate"""
    candidate = Candidate(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(candidate)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(candidate)
    return candidate


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=CandidateResponse)
async def update_candidate(
    id: UUID,
    data: CandidateUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update candidate"""
    candidate = db.query(Candidate).filter(Candidate.id == id).first()
    if not candidate:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Candidate not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(candidate, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(candidate)
    return candidate


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_candidate(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete candidate"""
    candidate = db.query(Candidate).filter(Candidate.id == id).first()
    if not candidate:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Candidate not found")

    db.delete(candidate)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.deliveryProof import DeliveryProof
from app.schemas.deliveryProof import DeliveryProofCreate, DeliveryProofUpdate, DeliveryProofResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/deliveryProofs", tags=["DeliveryProofs"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_deliveryProofs(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all deliveryProofs with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(DeliveryProof)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                DeliveryProof.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(DeliveryProof, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=DeliveryProofResponse)
async def get_deliveryProof(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get deliveryProof by ID"""
    deliveryProof = db.query(DeliveryProof).filter(DeliveryProof.id == id).first()
    if not deliveryProof:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="DeliveryProof not found")
    return deliveryProof


@router.post("/", response_model=DeliveryProofResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_deliveryProof(
    data: DeliveryProofCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new deliveryProof"""
    deliveryProof = DeliveryProof(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(deliveryProof)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(deliveryProof)
    return deliveryProof


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=DeliveryProofResponse)
async def update_deliveryProof(
    id: UUID,
    data: DeliveryProofUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update deliveryProof"""
    deliveryProof = db.query(DeliveryProof).filter(DeliveryProof.id == id).first()
    if not deliveryProof:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="DeliveryProof not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(deliveryProof, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(deliveryProof)
    return deliveryProof


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_deliveryProof(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete deliveryProof"""
    deliveryProof = db.query(DeliveryProof).filter(DeliveryProof.id == id).first()
    if not deliveryProof:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="DeliveryProof not found")

    db.delete(deliveryProof)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.stockTransfer import StockTransfer
from app.schemas.stockTransfer import StockTransferCreate, StockTransferUpdate, StockTransferResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/stockTransfers", tags=["StockTransfers"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_stockTransfers(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all stockTransfers with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(StockTransfer)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                StockTransfer.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(StockTransfer, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=StockTransferResponse)
async def get_stockTransfer(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get stockTransfer by ID"""
    stockTransfer = db.query(StockTransfer).filter(StockTransfer.id == id).first()
    if not stockTransfer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="StockTransfer not found")
    return stockTransfer


@router.post("/", response_model=StockTransferResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_stockTransfer(
    data: StockTransferCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new stockTransfer"""
    stockTransfer = StockTransfer(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(stockTransfer)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(stockTransfer)
    return stockTransfer


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=StockTransferResponse)
async def update_stockTransfer(
    id: UUID,
    data: StockTransferUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update stockTransfer"""
    stockTransfer = db.query(StockTransfer).filter(StockTransfer.id == id).first()
    if not stockTransfer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="StockTransfer not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(stockTransfer, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(stockTransfer)
    return stockTransfer


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_stockTransfer(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete stockTransfer"""
    stockTransfer = db.query(StockTransfer).filter(StockTransfer.id == id).first()
    if not stockTransfer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="StockTransfer not found")

    db.delete(stockTransfer)
    db.commit()
```

Create FastAPI CRUD endpoints for Task with pagination, search, and proper error handling

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.task import Task
from app.schemas.task import TaskCreate, TaskUpdate, TaskResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/tasks", tags=["Tasks"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_tasks(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all tasks with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Task)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Task.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Task, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=TaskResponse)
async def get_task(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get task by ID"""
    task = db.query(Task).filter(Task.id == id).first()
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")
    return task


@router.post("/", response_model=TaskResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_task(
    data: TaskCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new task"""
    task = Task(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(task)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(task)
    return task


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=TaskResponse)
async def update_task(
    id: UUID,
    data: TaskUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update task"""
    task = db.query(Task).filter(Task.id == id).first()
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(task, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(task)
    return task


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_task(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete task"""
    task = db.query(Task).filter(Task.id == id).first()
    if not task:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Task not found")

    db.delete(task)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.ticket import Ticket
from app.schemas.ticket import TicketCreate, TicketUpdate, TicketResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/tickets", tags=["Tickets"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_tickets(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all tickets with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Ticket)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Ticket.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Ticket, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=TicketResponse)
async def get_ticket(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get ticket by ID"""
    ticket = db.query(Ticket).filter(Ticket.id == id).first()
    if not ticket:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Ticket not found")
    return ticket


@router.post("/", response_model=TicketResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_ticket(
    data: TicketCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new ticket"""
    ticket = Ticket(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(ticket)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(ticket)
    return ticket


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=TicketResponse)
async def update_ticket(
    id: UUID,
    data: TicketUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update ticket"""
    ticket = db.query(Ticket).filter(Ticket.id == id).first()
    if not ticket:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Ticket not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(ticket, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(ticket)
    return ticket


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_ticket(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete ticket"""
    ticket = db.query(Ticket).filter(Ticket.id == id).first()
    if not ticket:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Ticket not found")

    db.delete(ticket)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from app.schemas.machine import MachineCreate, MachineUpdate, MachineResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/machines", tags=["Machines"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_machines(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all machines with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(Machine)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                Machine.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(Machine, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=MachineResponse)
async def get_machine(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get machine by ID"""
    machine = db.query(Machine).filter(Machine.id == id).first()
    if not machine:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Machine not found")
    return machine


@router.post("/", response_model=MachineResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_machine(
    data: MachineCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new machine"""
    machine = Machine(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(machine)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(machine)
    return machine


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=MachineResponse)
async def update_machine(
    id: UUID,
    data: MachineUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update machine"""
    machine = db.query(Machine).filter(Machine.id == id).first()
    if not machine:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Machine not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(machine, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(machine)
    return machine


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_machine(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete machine"""
    machine = db.query(Machine).filter(Machine.id == id).first()
    if not machine:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Machine not found")

    db.delete(machine)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from typing import List, Optional
```

```python
async def list_documents(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),

    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),

):

            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=DocumentResponse)
async def get_document(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):

    if not document:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document not found")
    return document


@router.post("/", response_model=DocumentResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)

    db: Session = Depends(get_db),

):
    """Update document"""
    document = db.query(Document).filter(Document.id == id).first()
    if not document:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Document not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(document, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(document)

@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_document(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):

    document = db.query(Document).filter(Document.id == id).first()
```

```python
from fastapi import APIRouter, Depends, HTTPException, status, Query
from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import or_
from typing import List, Optional
from uuid import UUID

from app.core.database import get_db
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.vetAppointment import VetAppointment
from app.schemas.vetAppointment import VetAppointmentCreate, VetAppointmentUpdate, VetAppointmentResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/vetAppointments", tags=["VetAppointments"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_vetAppointments(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all vetAppointments with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(VetAppointment)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                VetAppointment.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(VetAppointment, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=VetAppointmentResponse)
async def get_vetAppointment(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get vetAppointment by ID"""
    vetAppointment = db.query(VetAppointment).filter(VetAppointment.id == id).first()
    if not vetAppointment:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="VetAppointment not found")
    return vetAppointment


@router.post("/", response_model=VetAppointmentResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_vetAppointment(
    data: VetAppointmentCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new vetAppointment"""
    vetAppointment = VetAppointment(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(vetAppointment)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(vetAppointment)
    return vetAppointment


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=VetAppointmentResponse)
async def update_vetAppointment(
    id: UUID,
    data: VetAppointmentUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update vetAppointment"""
    vetAppointment = db.query(VetAppointment).filter(VetAppointment.id == id).first()
    if not vetAppointment:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="VetAppointment not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(vetAppointment, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(vetAppointment)
    return vetAppointment


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_vetAppointment(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete vetAppointment"""
    vetAppointment = db.query(VetAppointment).filter(VetAppointment.id == id).first()
    if not vetAppointment:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="VetAppointment not found")

    db.delete(vetAppointment)
    db.commit()
```

```python
from app.core.auth import get_current_user
from app.models.laundryCustomer import LaundryCustomer
from app.schemas.laundryCustomer import LaundryCustomerCreate, LaundryCustomerUpdate, LaundryCustomerResponse

router = APIRouter(prefix="/laundryCustomers", tags=["LaundryCustomers"])


@router.get("/", response_model=dict)
async def list_laundryCustomers(
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1),
    limit: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100),
    search: Optional[str] = None,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """List all laundryCustomers with pagination and search"""
    query = db.query(LaundryCustomer)

    if search:
        query = query.filter(
            or_(
                LaundryCustomer.name.ilike(f"%{search}%") if hasattr(LaundryCustomer, 'name') else True,
            )
        )

    total = query.count()
    items = query.offset((page - 1) * limit).limit(limit).all()

    return {
        "items": items,
        "total": total,
        "page": page,
        "limit": limit,
        "hasMore": (page * limit) < total
    }


@router.get("/{id}", response_model=LaundryCustomerResponse)
async def get_laundryCustomer(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Get laundryCustomer by ID"""
    laundryCustomer = db.query(LaundryCustomer).filter(LaundryCustomer.id == id).first()
    if not laundryCustomer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="LaundryCustomer not found")
    return laundryCustomer


@router.post("/", response_model=LaundryCustomerResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
async def create_laundryCustomer(
    data: LaundryCustomerCreate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Create new laundryCustomer"""
    laundryCustomer = LaundryCustomer(**data.model_dump())
    db.add(laundryCustomer)
    db.commit()
    db.refresh(laundryCustomer)
    return laundryCustomer


@router.put("/{id}", response_model=LaundryCustomerResponse)
async def update_laundryCustomer(
    id: UUID,
    data: LaundryCustomerUpdate,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Update laundryCustomer"""
    laundryCustomer = db.query(LaundryCustomer).filter(LaundryCustomer.id == id).first()
    if not laundryCustomer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="LaundryCustomer not found")

    for field, value in data.model_dump(exclude_unset=True).items():
        setattr(laundryCustomer, field, value)

    db.commit()
    db.refresh(laundryCustomer)
    return laundryCustomer


@router.delete("/{id}", status_code=status.HTTP_204_NO_CONTENT)
async def delete_laundryCustomer(
    id: UUID,
    db: Session = Depends(get_db),
    current_user = Depends(get_current_user),
):
    """Delete laundryCustomer"""
    laundryCustomer = db.query(LaundryCustomer).filter(LaundryCustomer.id == id).first()
    if not laundryCustomer:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="LaundryCustomer not found")

    db.delete(laundryCustomer)
    db.commit()
```
